set.body: Runs 28652832108..28931960499 all failed in 'Full devtools::test() with stress seeds': test-backend-integration.R callr subprocess tests cannot spawn child R in installed-package context ('System command R failed'), and an arrayfire-requiring test errors instead of skipping when the backend is absent. Blocks quality-tracking.md §8.1 tier gate (7 consecutive green nights). Fix: make callr tests locate the child R correctly or skip with reason in installed context; skip_if_not_installed for arrayfire paths.
set.title: nightly-stress red 6 consecutive nights: installed-pkg context fragility (callr child spawn, missing-arrayfire skips)
